message: Uncaught ReferenceError: Bell is not defined
description: The Bell icon from lucide-react was used but not imported. Replaced the manual button with NotificationDropdown which handles the icon correctly.

message: Module 'src/lib/mockData.ts' declares 'Order' locally, but it is not exported.
description: Exported Order and OrderStatus types from mockData.ts.

message: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type 'any' can't be used to index type STATUS_META.
description: Fixed by properly exporting and importing Order types. STATUS_META indexing now has correct types.

message: Type '(orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => Promise<void>' is not assignable to type '(orderId: number, newStatus: OrderStatus) => void'.
description: Changed orderId parameter type from string to number in handleStatusUpdate.

message: Argument of type 'any[]' is not assignable to parameter of type '[sql: string, args?: InArgs | undefined]'.
description: Refactored turso.execute wrapper to avoid Proxy type issues and fixed recursion.

message: ESLint couldn't find an eslint.config.(js|mjs|cjs) file.
description: The project is using ESLint 9 which expects flat config (eslint.config.js), but it only has .eslintrc.json. The 'lint' script fails.
Settings were stored in local state in the settings page and didn't reflect in the sidebar or other parts of the app until refreshed. Fixed by implementing SettingsProvider context.

The Proxy on turso.execute called initDb which in turn called turso.execute before _initialized was set to true, causing infinite recursion. Fixed by setting _initialized = true before calling initDb.
